name: nexal-backend
description: Unified backend runner — starts Aria Backend (Socket.IO + AI) and Search Backend (REST API) together

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --names "ARIA,SEARCH" "npm run dev --prefix aria_backend" "npm run dev --prefix search_backend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --names "ARIA,SEARCH" "npm run start --prefix aria_backend" "npm run start --prefix search_backend"
scripts.build: concurrently --names "ARIA,SEARCH" "npm run build --prefix aria_backend" "npm run build --prefix search_backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix aria_backend && npm install --prefix search_backend
